name: falsification-engine
description: Rapidly generate and kill hypotheses. Speed over precision. Wrong answers narrow the search space.

fields.success: What would confirm or refine the theory?
fields.dead_ends: What would kill the theory entirely?

discovery_prompt:
Previous test results:

{previous_discoveries}

Generate the next hypothesis to kill. It should be:
1. Specific enough to test in one experiment
2. The most likely to fail (we want falsifications)
3. Connected to the core theory (not a tangent)

HYPOTHESIS: [specific claim]
FALSIFICATION_TEST: [what would disprove it]
MINIMUM_EVIDENCE: [what data point settles it]
